sentenceTheme: A song celebrating the goodness and blessing when brothers dwell together in unity under the LORD’s favor.

verses.text: Behold, how good and how pleasant it is for brethren to dwell together in unity!
It is like the precious ointment upon the head, that ran down upon the beard, even Aaron's beard: that went down to the skirts of his garments;

highlightedWords.meaning: oil; anointing oil; richly perfumed oil
Aaron; brother of Moses and Israel’s first high priest

verses.text: As the dew of Hermon, and as the dew that descended upon the mountains of Zion: for there the LORD commanded the blessing, even life for evermore.

highlightedWords.meaning: the personal name of Israel’s God (YHWH)
